case_title: MIRIAM PAVLOVA NALLEY et al VS. JANET GONG

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-25-2011, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GONG, JANET
DUE DILIGENCE - UNSUCESSFUL (TO SERVE PARTY JANET GONG)
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT GONG, JANET

THE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-07-2011 IS CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO NOV-04-2011 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NALLEY, MIRIAM PAVLOVA CABRALES, BRIAN DAVID RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GONG, JANET $220.00 PRINCIPAL, $120.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $340.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-14-2011 - JUDGMENT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT GONG, JANET
